mapper.select: SELECT RC.COMMENT_NO AS commentNo, RC.CONTENT AS content, PU.USER_NAME AS writer, RC.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, RC.UPDATED AS updated, RC.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, RC.USER_ID AS userId FROM REVIEW_COMMENT RC JOIN PLOGUES_USER PU ON RC.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID WHERE RC.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND RC.DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY RC.COMMENT_NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW_COMMENT ( COMMENT_NO, CONTENT, BOARD_NO, USER_ID ) VALUES ( SEQ_REVIEW_COMMENT.NEXTVAL, #{content}, #{boardNo}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE REVIEW_COMMENT SET CONTENT = #{content}, UPDATED = 'Y' WHERE COMMENT_NO = #{commentNo} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED = 'N'
UPDATE REVIEW_COMMENT SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE COMMENT_NO = #{commentNo} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
